violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Thermometer is lacking in the prep unit. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
Can opener is not in good repair. Blade is rusted and chipped. Can opener/blade must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Tape observed on the handles and edges of the slide cold hold unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material that is durable and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Outer surfaces of equipment, shelving in refrigeration units, condenser fan guards must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
Menu lacks an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance and at the side of the building, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Tape observed on the handles and edges of the slide cold hold unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material that is durable and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The can opener was not in good repair. The blade is rusted and chipped. Can opener blade must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the outside of equipment and the shelving in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the walk-in cooler do not have coving. Space observed between the walls and floor. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2021

The walls throughout the facility observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance and at the side of the establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

Tape observed in several areas of the establishment including on the handles and edges of the 2-door slide cold hold. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Tape must be removed and equipment repaired using proper materials. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in shelving, the walk-in condenser fans, as well as the outer and inner surfaces of equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the walk-in cooler observed without proper coving. Portions of the walls near the floor have worn away in areas leaving space between the wall and floor. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Proper coving is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2021
A ceiling tile is missing in the warewashing/prep area. Ceiling tile must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
